sections.content:
Big changes! Let me analyze:
- The white diamond at (49-53, 38-42) turned dark gray (id=44, color=G, pixels=12) - it went back to dark gray!
- The dark gray diamond at (35, 45) is still there (id=34, color=G, pixels=8)
- The orange diamond at (28, 43) is still there (id=24, color=O, pixels=19)
- The purple square at (32, 45) is still there (id=28, color=p, pixels=21)
So clicking (28, 43) caused the white diamond at the bottom to turn dark gray. This is like a "reset" or "de-activation".
Wait, let me think about the pattern more carefully. The orange chain worked like this:
1. Click orange diamond -> moves down, creates dark gray shapes
2. Click dark gray diamond -> activates (white)
3. Click purple square -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
4. Click ring -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
For the purple chain:
1. Click purple square -> moves down, creates dark gray shapes
2. Click dark gray diamond -> activates (white)
3. Click dark gray square -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
4. Click orange diamond outline -> activates (white), previous goes back to dark gray
5. Click orange diamond at (28, 43) -> ??? (caused the white diamond to turn dark gray)
So the pattern is that clicking the orange diamond at (28, 43) "reset" the activation. But why?
Actually, looking at the orange chain, after step 4 (clicking the ring), the level was completed. But here, the level is not completed yet.
Maybe I need to click the purple ring at (15-21, 54-60) instead? Or maybe I need to click the dark gray diamond at (35, 45) again?
Let me try clicking the dark gray diamond at (35, 45) again to see if it re-activates.
Actually wait - looking at the image more carefully, I see the orange diamond at (28, 43) has a magenta center. And the purple square at (32, 45) has a magenta center. And the dark gray diamond at (35, 45) is dark gray. And the diamond at (51, 40) is now dark gray.
The pattern seems to be that the activation (white) moves down the chain. When I clicked (28, 43), it caused the activation to "reset" - the white diamond went back to dark gray.
Maybe I need to click the dark gray diamond at (35, 45) again to re-activate it?
Or maybe I need to click the purple ring at (15-21, 54-60)?
Let me try clicking the dark gray diamond at (36, 45) again.
